task_snapshots.title: 382-04: Migration — replace git subprocess calls
task_snapshots.description:
Replace scattered subprocess.run(["git", ...]) calls with centralized git_ops/git_context:
- src/bernstein/core/orchestrator.py: replace auto-commit, push, merge calls
- src/bernstein/core/context.py: replace git log/ls-files calls with git_context
- src/bernstein/core/spawner.py: replace any git calls

Ensure all existing tests still pass after migration.

Completion: grep_absent subprocess.run.*git in these three files.

[subtask of 28550c616824]
